confidence_rationale: This is an instructional video, not a performance to be scored

technique_summary: Expert-level instructional video demonstrating advanced double loop technique for laparoscopic hernia repair, not FLS Task 3 endoloop

demonstrated_techniques: safe tissue resection avoiding vital structures
anatomical identification of cord vessels and vas deferens
double loop technique with spinal needle
contralateral approach for small PPV closure
verbal_cues: If you're not sure, do NOT do it or do it partially
Be careful with the cord structures
common_errors_addressed: injury to cord structures during dissection

improvement_suggestions: This is expert-level instructional content for advanced laparoscopic techniques, not FLS training material
